title: Notification or indication on why Timeline dates were changed automatically
excerpt: Dependency mode defaulted to Flexible for my board. For a particular task, if I set a “Dependent on”, this will not allow me to set dates that overlap with the dependent task. This is very unintuitive from the word “flex…

posts.author: pmalbu (Phil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dependency mode defaulted to Flexible for my board. For a particular task, if I set a “Dependent on”, this will not allow me to set dates that overlap with the dependent task. This is very unintuitive from the word “flexible”. My goal is to have the two tasks run in parallel (same dates). When I try to change the dates of the task with the dependency, the dates are automatically changed to be after the dependent task completes. There is no explanation or notification explaining why the dates were changed automatically. I spent 45 minutes chatting with Support to resolve this. It was a frustrating experience.

My feature request is to have some sort of indication/notification when dates are automatically changed (i.e. Dates automatically changed because your dependency mode is “Flexible”. To have dates overlap, change to “Strict” or “No action”).
